positive: A majestic stylized fox standing amidst glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and abstract woodland foliage. The fox should have a sleek, powerful silhouette and be depicted with vibrant, segmented colors (deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and gold accents) that pop against a contrasting midnight black and deep violet background. The scene should use strong, clean graphic lines and high contrast, reminiscent of Nordic folklore meets modern stained glass art. Centered composition, isolated subject visibility, suitable for seamless repeat print on apparel. Cinematic volumetric lighting, octane render, 8k, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low quality, grainy, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered hands, muted colors, messy composition, busy background, photorealism, logos
